title: lysimachia × intermedia
intro: Lysimachia × intermedia, also known as golden seal or Canadian goldenseal, is a hybrid plant derived from the combination of Lysimachia hybrida and Lysimachia terrestris. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antibacterial and anti-inflammatory properties, which make it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of golden seal include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and support immune function, making it a popular herbal remedy for colds, sore throats, and skin irritations. Golden seal can be prepared in various herbal forms, including capsules, tinctures, and teas, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
